blogs.title: Flutter Clean Architecture: A Practical Guide for 2025
blogs.excerpt: Learn how to structure your Flutter applications with Clean Architecture, featuring real-world examples from enterprise projects with 150K+ daily active users.
blogs.content:
# Flutter Clean Architecture: A Practical Guide for 2025

Clean Architecture in Flutter separates your codebase into distinct layers...

## The Three Layers

### 1. Domain Layer
The innermost layer contains your business logic...

### 2. Data Layer
Handles all data operations...

### 3. Presentation Layer
Contains your UI and state management...

## Repository Pattern

```dart
abstract class SkillsRepository {
  Future<List<Skill>> getSkills();
}
```

## Conclusion
Clean Architecture pays dividends in large teams.
blogs.author: Gowtham Selvaraj

blogs.title: iOS Security Best Practices: AES-256 Encryption & Certificate Pinning
blogs.excerpt: A deep dive into securing iOS applications for government-grade deployments using AES-256/GCM encryption, certificate pinning, and OAuth 2.0.
blogs.content:
# iOS Security Best Practices

When building government-grade iOS apps, security is paramount...

## AES-256/GCM Encryption

```swift
func encrypt(data: Data, key: SymmetricKey) throws -> Data {
    let sealedBox = try AES.GCM.seal(data, using: key)
    return sealedBox.combined!
}
```

## Certificate Pinning

Implement SSL pinning using URLSessionDelegate...
